title: Provide purpose-led Flux attributes across ResearchOps interactives.

run.taskSummary: Keep fallback events and strengthen ResearchOps semantic analytics context across static and dynamic controls.

validations: focused Flux tracker and session tests: 8 passed
npm test: 370 passed after two Codex review remediation rounds
npm run lint: zero errors with existing warnings
issues: Unlabelled and positional fallback narratives appeared for ResearchOps controls without publisher context.
Codex review identified contact-protocol PII exposure, collapsed dynamic action keys and incorrect project scope on non-project routes; all three were remediated with regressions.
The second Codex pass identified collapsed panel and option controls plus generic dynamic disclosures; all were remediated with explicit or privacy-safe distinct context and regressions.
warnings: The defensive fallback remains available by product decision.
Historical fallback events cannot be safely relabelled after capture.
